comment: AUTO-GENERATED by lean/EmitArtifacts.lean from Fabric.VrmUpgrade.ScssMToon. DO NOT EDIT.

entries.lossy_reason: SCSS _Shadow gates the shade colour multiplicatively; MToon shadeColorFactor is absolute. Round-trip pins _Shadow=0.5.
SCSS Range 0..20 mapped via 8/(1+w); MToon power range typically 0..8. Outside the bracket clamps.
SCSS supports 4 matcap slots; only slot 1 round-trips. _Matcap1Strength is folded into matcapFactor.
SCSS has 3 transparency modes (dithered / sharp cutout / z-write); MToon transparentWithZWrite is a single bool. Only z-write mode round-trips precisely.

lossy_mtoon_only: shadingToonyFactor (SCSS uses a light ramp LUT instead of a single toony scalar)
renderQueueOffsetNumber (Unity material renderQueue handles this on the SCSS side)
lossy_scss_only: _Ramp (light ramp LUT — represent as MToon shadingShiftTexture if possible, or drop)
_HatchingTex and family (SCSS hatching has no MToon equivalent)
